title: FoilOptim: Silent failure on Apply Best geometry error
description: psotaskfoil.cpp:70-74 - No error message when foil creation fails in createOptimizedFoil()

title: OptimFoilDlg: run/cancel/progress/results workflow
description: Define OptimFoilDlg controls (objectives, variables), wire PSO start/cancel, and surface results (pareto/summary) for foil optimization.
close_reason: Core workflow complete: run/cancel/progress/Apply Best all functional. UI polish (2xs.2) remains as P3 backlog.

title: FoilOptim: Apply Best → create/insert optimized foil
description: Implement 'Apply Best' so it safely creates a new Foil object (do not mutate the original by default), inserts it into the registry/database, and updates XDirect selection/plots.\n\nSee FOIL_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md Phase E.

title: FoilOptim: save optimized foil in project
description: Ensure optimized foils (and any associated polars/op points if produced) are persisted with the Flow5 project and reload correctly.\n\nSee FOIL_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md Phase E.

title: FoilOptim: UI polish + guardrails
description: Improve input validation and user feedback in OptimFoilDlg (missing polar/foil, nonsense bounds, failure messages), and polish the results presentation.

title: Optimization graph makes no sense and shows 0 to 1 iterations
notes: Graph now rescales and updates every iteration.

title: FoilOptim: m_BestValid not set on error exit
description: optimfoildlg.cpp:198-204 - Apply Best stays disabled without explanation when optimization fails

title: FoilOptim: Hardcoded single Cl objective
description: optimfoildlg.cpp:129-130 - No user control over what to optimize. Need UI for objective selection.

title: Objective Configuration UI (Target CL/Alpha)
description: Implement UI and logic for selecting objectives: Min CD, Max L/D. Allow solving for Alpha or Flap to reach a Target CL. Update PSOTaskFoil to handle these objective types.

title: FoilOptim: No timeout/watchdog on XFoil solver
description: psotask.cpp:219-225 - Infinite hang if XFoil never converges on a particle

title: testing the issue system
FoilOptim: V2 preset silently fails with empty variables
close_reason: Fixed in optimfoildlg.cpp - added validation checks and safe task deletion

title: Optimization window should include a 2d section view where each tried section is shown during analysis
notes: Added 2d section preview to OptimFoilDlg using FoilWt. Shows dashed ghost of base foil behind candidate; updates on each OPTIM_ITER_EVENT (best per iteration).

title: Foil optimization in Flow5 (end-to-end)
description: Source of truth: FOIL_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md (docs/ are inspiration only).\n\nGoal: ship a complete foil optimization workflow (XDirect UI → optimization task → XFoil evaluation → results → apply/save) with headless API smoke tests.

title: FoilOptim: robust calcFitness penalties + polar-type handling
description: Make PSOTaskFoil::calcFitness deterministic and failure-tolerant: consistent penalties for invalid geometry vs non-convergence, correct handling for polar types (fixed AoA/Cl/etc), and clear objective-to-metric mapping.\n\nSee FOIL_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md Phase A.

title: FoilOptim: headless PSO run harness (deterministic small run)
description: Provide a minimal headless runner (under API_examples/) that runs a small PSO loop for a few iterations and reports best fitness + improvement vs baseline. Should be deterministic-ish (fixed seed / stable config) and support cancellation.\n\nSee FOIL_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md Phase C.

title: FoilOptim: headless smoke/regression tests
description: Maintain API_examples-based smoke/regression coverage for foil optimization paths (converged baseline, invalid geometry, XFoil unconverged, cancellation).\n\nSee FOIL_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md Phases A/F.
close_reason: 3/4 test paths implemented (baseline, invalid geometry, unconverged). Cancellation test (hmi.3.4) deferred to P3 due to headless threading limitations.

title: FoilOptim Test: baseline converged fitness (finite metrics)
description: Headless smoke test should assert: converged=true and finite objective metrics for a known foil+polar baseline. (The existing API_examples/foiloptimize harness covers this; keep it stable and tighten assertions as needed.)

title: FoilOptim Test: invalid geometry → penalty path
description: Add a headless case that generates invalid foil geometry (or violates constraints) and assert calcFitness returns a penalty + converged=false (or equivalent contract).

title: FoilOptim Test: XFoil unconverged → penalty path
description: Add a headless case that triggers XFoil non-convergence (or uses extreme parameters) and assert calcFitness returns the expected penalty contract without crashing.

title: FoilOptim Test: cancellation path
description: Test 5 added but SKIPPED in headless mode - cancellation requires Qt event loop for async thread coordination. Can be tested manually in GUI or needs alternative approach (signal-based mock).

title: FoilOptim Bug: OpenBLAS dgetrf_parallel segfault in spline solve
description: Observed SIGSEGV in libopenblas dgetrf_parallel during CubicSpline::solve() via matrix::solveLinearSystem → Foil::initGeometry (seen in gdb backtrace).\n\nMitigation: run headless tests with OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1; long-term fix may require forcing single-thread LAPACK path or switching solver.
notes: Repro: OptimFoilDlg Run -> 'Building swarm...' then app crashes (progress bar in busy/full state). Crash occurs during swarm build before OPTIM_MAKESWARM_EVENT, likely inside Foil::initGeometry -> CubicSpline::solve -> OpenBLAS dgetrf. Investigate: validate reduced base-node set ordering/duplicates; consider keeping full base nodes with y-delta updates instead of replacing base nodes; add guards/logging around spline solve and geometry validity; evaluate pop size/variable count impact.

title: FoilOptim: cache evaluation results (hash particle positions)
description: Add optional caching for expensive XFoil evaluations (hash particle position vector → computed metrics) to avoid repeat work during PSO.

title: FoilOptim: multi-threading safety audit (XFoilTask globals)
description: Audit whether PSO fitness evaluation can be parallelized safely (XFoilTask/XFoil globals, cancellation flags, shared state). Gate multi-threading if not safe.

title: Windows build + test workflow
description:
Define and validate a Windows 11 build + test workflow (MSVC Qt6 kit) for Flow5 + FoilOptim.

Scope:
- Document prerequisites (Qt6 MSVC kit, Visual Studio, SDKs: Gmsh headers/libs, OpenCascade if enabled).
- Add scripts or notes for building the qmake project (flow5.pro) on Windows and running the foiloptimize example.
- Optional: set up CI job (later) or checklist.

Acceptance:
- A reproducible set of steps exists in repo docs and/or scripts.
- The foiloptimize example can be built and run on Windows with known dependency paths.

title: FoilOptim Mode B: 3D panel coupling (induced AoA)
description: Mode B integrates Flow5 3D panel analysis into the foil optimization loop to account for induced angle of attack at a selected wing section.

title: Mode B: define inputs + data flow
description: Define required inputs (wing, section index, flight conditions, panel settings) and data flow for induced AoA integration. Document alpha_eff usage and fallback behavior when 3D analysis fails.

title: Mode B: 3D analysis adapter (induced AoA extractor)
description: Implement a reusable adapter/service to run Flow5 3D panel analysis and return induced AoA at a selected wing section, with support for injecting candidate section geometry and baseline data for other sections.

title: Mode B: integrate 3D induced AoA into optimization loop
description: Extend the optimization loop to call the 3D adapter per particle/iteration, compute alpha_eff, and evaluate XFoil with induced AoA accounted for. Ensure cancellation + penalty path on failure.

title: Mode B: caching + evaluation cadence controls
description: Add caching for repeated 3D analysis inputs and provide controls for evaluation cadence (e.g., run 3D every N iterations) to manage runtime.

title: Mode B: UI controls for wing/section + mode toggle
description: Add Mode A/Mode B toggle, wing + section selectors, and 3D analysis condition inputs. Surface runtime warnings for Mode B.

title: Mode B test: induced AoA extraction (headless)
description: Add a headless test that runs 3D panel analysis on a known wing and asserts induced AoA extraction for a selected section.

title: Mode B test: 3D → XFoil integration + failure path
description: Add an integration test that exercises Mode B evaluation (3D induced AoA feeding XFoil) and verifies penalty behavior when 3D analysis fails.

title: Mode B: validation vs Mode A (known wing)
description: Define validation criteria and compare Mode A vs Mode B outputs on a known wing/section. Record expected induced AoA effects and acceptance thresholds.

title: Mode B bug: invalid 3D analysis output handling
description: Guard against invalid/empty 3D panel analysis outputs (NaN/inf induced AoA, missing section data). Ensure penalties + user feedback instead of crashes.

title: FoilOptim: Race condition on task deletion
close_reason: Fixed in optimfoildlg.cpp - added validation checks and safe task deletion

title: FoilOptim: No validation of variable count before run
close_reason: Fixed in optimfoildlg.cpp - added validation checks and safe task deletion

title: Advanced Constraints Engine (Wiggliness, Curvature)
description: Implement Wiggliness (integral of y'' squared) and Geometric (LE/TE/Thickness, Section Modulus) constraints in PSOTaskFoil. Drop curvature continuity checks as Flow5 Splines handle this.

title: FoilOptim: No progress during swarm building
description: UI shows indeterminate progress bar during swarm init phase - can take minutes for large foils

title: Optimization Panel UI (Tabbed Inspector)
description: Refactor OptimFoilDlg into a comprehensive OptimizationPanel with tabbed sections for Objectives, Constraints, Geometry, and Settings, mirroring Foilinizer.

title: Geometry Resampling & Bounds Logic
description: Implement geometry resampling to reduce control points during optimization (e.g., from 30 to 8) for smoother convergence, then resample back to high-res. Implement bounds scaling logic to constrain search space.

title: Fix FoilOptim crash on startup
FoilOptim: No results summary dialog
description: Just shows 'Best Cl: X' then closes - need detailed report with iterations, time, geometry delta

title: Foilinizer Vision Integration
Fluid Calculator Tool (UI + Logic)
description: Implement a Fluid Calculator tool (dialog/widget) to derive aerodynamic targets (CL, Re, Mach) from physical sailing parameters (Speed, Chord, Lift, Fluid Type). \n\nReference: Foilinizer .

title: Beam Calculator Tool (UI + Logic)
description: Implement a Beam Calculator tool to determine structural requirements (Section Modulus, Bending Moment) from wing parameters (Span, Load Distribution, Material). \n\nReference: Foilinizer .

title: Cavitation Analysis & Constraint
description: Implement Cavitation Analysis logic to calculate Inception Speed based on Cp distribution and Depth. Add as a constraint type in the optimizer. \n\nReference: Foilinizer .

title: Enhanced Optimization Progress Dialog (Live Plots)
description: Enhance the Optimization Progress Dialog to show live plots of objective fitness and constraint violations over time, replacing the simple progress bar. \n\nReference: Foilinizer .

title: Advanced Constraint Editor UI
description: Implement a rich table-based UI for configuring multiple constraints (Geometric, Aerodynamic, Structural) with specific parameters (e.g., 'Min Thickness at 90% chord'). \n\nReference: Foilinizer .

title: PSOTaskFoil should validate polar target selection and handle invalid/empty alpha or Cl specs
description: Guard against empty or mismatched polar specs (e.g., missing aoaSpec/Cl targets). Allow explicit choice of evaluation point and fallback behavior instead of silently using defaults.

title: FoilOptim: variable preset selection plumbing (UI + task)
description: Provide UI + task helpers to choose variable sets and constraints beyond the initial y-only base-node set.

title: FoilOptim: variable preset v1 (y-only base nodes) + constraints
description: Finalize the initial variable set: y-only base-node variables with LE/TE fixed, plus guard constraints (min thickness/no crossover, optional TE gap bounds, optional smoothness/curvature penalties).\n\nSee FOIL_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md Phase B.

title: FoilOptim: add preset v2 (camber/thickness or coupled y)
description: Add a second, safer parameterization than raw y-only nodes (e.g., camber+thickness on a fixed x grid, or coupled top/bottom y deltas) to reduce invalid geometries and improve optimization stability.\n\nSee FOIL_OPTIMIZATION_PLAN.md Phase B.

title: FoilOptim: Thread safety on shared foil/polar pointers
description: UB if foil/polar modified during optimization run - needs mutex or copy strategy
